text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Mejiro McQueen has been giving her all in her
recent races, so we've come here to buy her
something sweet as a reward. However...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Jiggly pudding, cake with whipped cream...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
I've been given the opportunity to eat my
beloved sweets, yet my appetite falters.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
While it's certainly welcome that I refrain from
overeating... this just... comes as such a shock.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
My guess is she's still feeling tired. I should
probably reevaluate her race schedule to ensure
she can perform at her best going forward.
